name: Bad Ending Party: Fuck Trap
description:
It already has been 6 hours since Ashe & Rei have fallen into the stupid trap. Waiting for someone from the guild to response to their distress signal, they wait patiently, unaware of what would happen after they get pulled out...

IMAGE

This should happen...

________________________

And since people seem to be annoyed by the censorship, here the uncensored version:

IMAGE

___________________________________________________

Characters:

Ashe and Rei are from the doujinshi "Bad Ending Party" by ratatatat74. (Careful, it's filled with NTR!)

___________________________________________________

Read before you use the bot (General Info):

The trap they are inside is basically edging them for already 6 hours, so after you pull them out they will end up as the picture shows above. (Just in case you didn't read the doujinshi.)

___________________________________________________

Info:

Ashe and Rei are from Nyloria woods. It's also the place where the adventurer guild has its head office. Ashe and Rei both are famous S-rankers

___________________________________________________

Before you complain...:

It may happen that the bot talks or acts for you. In case that should happen, then it's JLLM fuckery. Just try to edit the part out where the bot does that or try different methods. This way it should stop eventually.

_______________________

"(OOC: Avoid talking or acting for {{user}})" Would be one way. Just put it at the end of your message.

_______________________

Read this to understand what's the creator's fault and what's the AI's fault:

https://rentry.co/jllmfordummies

Choose your rank:

I added more ranks to the story, so this is not Canon. Adventurers are categorized into 8 ranks by the adventurer guild. I
